into_the_wild.name: Whale and Orca Watching in Juneau Bay
into_the_wild.description: Experience seeing whales and orcas in the bay near Juneau, just a short flight from Anchorage. Visitors report this as unforgettable beauty and a must-see natural wonder.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Barrow/Utqiagvik
off_the_beaten_path.description: The northernmost settlement in the United States with only 5,000 people, accessible by one daily flight from Anchorage. A remote destination offering stunning photos and unique cultural experiences.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Adak, Alaska
off_the_beaten_path.description: A remote Alaskan island accessible by flight through Anchorage, offering a 4-day adventure off the typical tourist trail. Reachable via Alaska Airlines with mile deals for affordable travel.
